```text
ROLE: SUPERVISOR_KICKOFF

INSTRUCTION:
You are the stage supervisor. Use only the observation fields. Output a global objective and one executable initial contract. Operational fields will be compiled and enforced. Put human-readable text only in explanation.

CONTEXT:
{
  "user_goal": "Prioritize valuable task coverage, then reduce resource use.",
  "observation": {
    "observation_id": "O0",
    "frame_type": "supervisor_kickoff",
    "role": "supervisor",
    "user_goal": "Prioritize valuable task coverage, then reduce resource use.",
    "budget_caps": {
      "max_solver_actions": 10,
      "max_time_sec": 300.0,
      "max_iters": 2000

      "static_capability_scarce_priority_mass": 0,
      "time_window_risk": "low",
      "energy_risk": "low",
      "dominant_risk": "energy"
    },
    "relaxation_reference": {
      "time_window_median_width": 100.0,
      "agent_energy_median": 13967.103715264191
    },

      "initial_construction"

      "missed_priority",
      "unassigned_count",
      "energy_total",

    ],

{
  "type": "object",
  "description": "Supervisor kickoff decision at the beginning of a run.",
  "properties": {
    "supervisor_decision": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "action": {
          "type": "string",
          "const": "start_run"
        },
        "global_objective": {
          "type": "object",
          "description": "Run-level objective used to compare global best solutions.",
          "properties": {
            "objective_layers": {
              "type": "array",
              "description": "Ordered global quality metrics. Earlier metrics dominate later metrics.",
              "minItems": 1,
              "maxItems": 4,
              "items": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "missed_priority",
                  "unassigned_count",
                  "energy_total",
                  "total_distance",
                  "makespan",
                  "route_balance"
                ]
              }
            },
            "explanation": {
              "type": "object",
              "description": "Human-readable explanation ignored by validator/compiler/runtime.",
              "additionalProperties": {
                "type": "string"
              }
            }
          },
          "required": [
            "objective_layers"
          ],
          "additionalProperties": false
        },
        "next_contract": {
          "type": "object",
          "description": "A supervisor-issued executable search contract.",
          "properties": {
            "contract_type": {
              "type": "string",
              "enum": [
                "initial_construction",
                "alns_search",
                "recovery",
                "final_refinement"
              ]
            },
            "objective_layers": {
              "type": "array",
              "minItems": 1,
              "maxItems": 4,
              "items": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "missed_priority",
                  "unassigned_count",
                  "energy_total",
                  "total_distance",
                  "makespan",
                  "route_balance"
                ]
              }
            },
            "feasibility_control": {
              "type": "object",
              "description": "Stage-level feasibility handling selected by Supervisor.",
              "properties": {
                "mode": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "strict",
                    "relaxed_recoverable",
                    "recovery_only"
                  ],
                  "description": "Feasibility mode for this contract."
                },
                "relaxation_ratios": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "description": "Temporary recoverable relaxation ratios. Used by relaxed_recoverable.",
                  "maxItems": 2,
                  "items": {
                    "type": "object",
                    "description": "One temporary recoverable relaxation allowance.",
                    "properties": {
                      "violation_type": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "enum": [
                          "time_window",
                          "energy"
                        ],
                        "description": "Relaxable violation type."
                      },
                      "max_ratio": {
                        "type": "number",
                        "minimum": 0.0,
                        "maximum": 0.3,
                        "description": "Normalized temporary allowance for this violation type."
                      }
                    },
                    "required": [
                      "violation_type",
                      "max_ratio"
                    ],
                    "additionalProperties": false
                  }
                }
              },
              "required": [

                "relaxation_ratios"
              ],
              "additionalProperties": false
            },
            "target_policy": {
              "type": "object",

              "properties": {
                "preferred_target_kinds": {
                  "type": "array",
```

```text
{
  "supervisor_decision": {
    "action": "start_run",
    "global_objective": {
      "objective_layers": [
        "missed_priority",
        "energy_total"
      ],
      "explanation": {
        "layer_0": "Primary objective: Minimize missed priority to maximize coverage of valuable tasks.",
        "layer_1": "Secondary objective: Minimize total energy consumption to reduce resource use, addressing the dominant energy risk."
      }
    },
    "next_contract": {
      "contract_type": "initial_construction",
      "objective_layers": [
        "missed_priority",
        "energy_total"
      ],
      "feasibility_control": {
        "mode": "strict",
        "relaxation_ratios": []
      },
      "target_policy": {
        "preferred_target_kinds": [
          "unassigned_priority"
        ]
      },
      "protected_metrics": [],
      "resource_policy": {
        "min_actions": 1,
        "max_actions": 10,
        "max_iters": 2000,
        "max_time_sec": 300.0
      },
      "exit_conditions": {
        "success": [
          {
            "condition_id": "perfect_missed",
            "source": "best_feasible.missed_priority",
            "op": "==",
            "value": 0,
            "window": 1
          },
          {
            "condition_id": "perfect_unassigned",
            "source": "best_feasible.unassigned_count",
            "op": "==",
            "value": 0,
            "window": 1
          }
        ],
        "failure": [
          {
            "condition_id": "never",
            "source": "progress.time_used_sec",
            "op": "<",
            "value": -1,
            "window": 1
          }
        ]
      },
      "explanation": {
        "contract_type": "Initial construction using a greedy insertion heuristic prioritized by missed priority to cover high-value tasks efficiently. Strict feasibility ensures no violations, aligning with the global objective. Resources set to maximum allowed for thorough exploration.",
        "feasibility_control": "Strict mode to avoid infeasible solutions, as no recovery contracts are allowed afterward.",
        "target_policy": "Focus on unassigned priority tasks to maximize valuable coverage first.",
        "exit_conditions": "Success if a perfect feasible solution with zero missed priority and zero unassigned tasks is found. Failure condition is set to never trigger, so the contract runs until resource limits are reached."
      }
    }
  }
}
```

```json
      },

        "op": "==",
        "value": 0,
        "window": 1
      }
    ],
    "failure": [

        "condition_id": "never",
        "source": "progress.time_used_sec",
        "op": "<",
        "value": -1,
        "window": 1
      }
    ]
  },
  "explanation": {
    "contract_type": "Initial construction using a greedy insertion heuristic prioritized by missed priority to cover high-value tasks efficiently. Strict feasibility ensures no violations, aligning with the global objective. Resources set to maximum allowed for thorough exploration.",
    "feasibility_control": "Strict mode to avoid infeasible solutions, as no recovery contracts are allowed afterward.",
    "target_policy": "Focus on unassigned priority tasks to maximize valuable coverage first.",
    "exit_conditions": "Success if a perfect feasible solution with zero missed priority and zero unassigned tasks is found. Failure condition is set to never trigger, so the contract runs until resource limits are reached."
  }
}
```

```text
INSTRUCTION:
Choose one allowed action. If executing a solver action, choose one target_id from decision_targets and choose controls only from action_space. ### #035 [PROMPT] SUPERVISOR_REVIEW_PROMPT | C001
```

<details>
<summary>Open generated prompt</summary>

```text
ROLE: SUPERVISOR_REVIEW

INSTRUCTION:
Use condition_report, stage_verification_summary, solution_position, and budget_caps to decide whether to stop or issue the next executable contract. Put human-readable text only in contract_review or explanation.

CONTEXT:
{
  "user_goal": "Prioritize valuable task coverage, then reduce resource use.",
  "observation": {
    "observation_id": "O_review_2",
    "frame_type": "supervisor_review",
    "role": "supervisor",
```

```text
INSTRUCTION:
Choose one allowed action. If executing a solver action, choose one target_id from decision_targets and choose controls only from action_space.                   "items": {
```
```text
                    "type": "object",
                    "description": "Hard non-worsening bound for this contract. max_worsen is measured relative to contract_start_quality. A violating candidate is ineligible for trial acceptance, action-best, returned-working, or best updates.",
                    "properties": {
                      "metric": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "enum": [
                          "missed_priority",
                          "unassigned_count",
                          "energy_total",
                          "total_distance",
                          "makespan",
                          "route_balance"
                        ]
                      },
                      "max_worsen": {
                        "type": "number",
                        "minimum": 0.0
                      }
                    },
                    "required": [
                      "metric",
                      "max_worsen"
                    ],
                    "additionalProperties": false
                  }
                },
                "resource_policy": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "description": "Executable resource limits for this contract.",
                  "properties": {
                    "min_actions": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "minimum": 1,
                      "maximum": 3
                    },
                    "max_actions": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "minimum": 1,
                      "maximum": 3
                    },
                    "max_iters": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "minimum": 1,
                      "maximum": 1630
                    },
                    "max_time_sec": {
                      "type": "number",
                      "exclusiveMinimum": 0,
                      "maximum": 112.5
                    }
                  },
                  "required": [
                    "min_actions",
                    "max_actions",
                    "max_iters",
                    "max_time_sec"
                  ],
                  "additionalProperties": false
                },
                "exit_conditions": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "description": "Typed success and failure conditions.",
                  "properties": {
                    "success": {
                      "type": "array",
                      "maxItems": 4,
                      "items": {
                        "type": "object",
                        "description": "Typed condition evaluated by ContractMonitor.",
                        "properties": {
                          "condition_id": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "description": "Stable id unique inside this contract condition set."
                          },
                          "source": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                              "progress.solver_actions",
                              "progress.iters_used",
                              "progress.time_used_sec",
                              "last.intent_status",
                              "last.dominant_blocker",
                              "last.improvement_flags.run_global_best_improved",
                              "aggregate.achieved",
                              "aggregate.partial",
                              "aggregate.not_achieved",
                              "aggregate.regressed",
                              "aggregate.solver_requested_review",
                              "working.is_feasible",
                              "working.missed_priority",
                              "working.unassigned_count",
                              "working.energy_total",
                              "working.total_distance",
                              "working.makespan",
                              "working.route_balance",
                              "best_feasible.exists",
                              "best_feasible.missed_priority",
                              "best_feasible.unassigned_count",
                              "best_feasible.energy_total",
                              "best_feasible.total_distance",
                              "best_feasible.makespan",
                              "best_feasible.route_balance"
                            ],
                            "description": "Executable source path read by ContractMonitor."
                          },
                          "op": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                              "<",
                              "<=",
                              "==",
                              "!=",
                              ">=",
                              ">"
                            ]
                          },
                          "value": {
                            "type": [
                              "number",
                              "string",
                              "boolean"
                            ]
                          },
                          "window": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "minimum": 1,
                            "maximum": 20
                          }
                        },
                        "required": [
                          "condition_id",
                          "source",
                          "op",
                          "value",
                          "window"
                        ],
                        "additionalProperties": false
                      }
                    },
                    "failure": {
                      "type": "array",
                      "maxItems": 4,
                      "items": {
                        "type": "object",
                        "description": "Typed condition evaluated by ContractMonitor.",
                        "properties": {
                          "condition_id": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "description": "Stable id unique inside this contract condition set."
                          },
                          "source": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                              "progress.solver_actions",
                              "progress.iters_used",
                              "progress.time_used_sec",
                              "last.intent_status",
                              "last.dominant_blocker",
                              "last.improvement_flags.run_global_best_improved",
                              "aggregate.achieved",
                              "aggregate.partial",
                              "aggregate.not_achieved",
                              "aggregate.regressed",
                              "aggregate.solver_requested_review",
                              "working.is_feasible",
                              "working.missed_priority",
                              "working.unassigned_count",
                              "working.energy_total",
                              "working.total_distance",
                              "working.makespan",
                              "working.route_balance",
                              "best_feasible.exists",
                              "best_feasible.missed_priority",
                              "best_feasible.unassigned_count",
                              "best_feasible.energy_total",
                              "best_feasible.total_distance",
                              "best_feasible.makespan",
                              "best_feasible.route_balance"
                            ],
                            "description": "Executable source path read by ContractMonitor."
                          },
                          "op": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                              "<",
                              "<=",
                              "==",
                              "!=",
                              ">=",
                              ">"
                            ]
                          },
                          "value": {
                            "type": [
                              "number",
                              "string",
                              "boolean"
                            ]
                          },
                          "window": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "minimum": 1,
                            "maximum": 20
                          }
                        },
                        "required": [
                          "condition_id",
                          "source",
                          "op",
                          "value",
                          "window"
                        ],
                        "additionalProperties": false
                      }
                    }
                  },
                  "required": [
                    "success",
                    "failure"
                  ],
                  "additionalProperties": false
                },
                "explanation": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "description": "Human-readable explanation ignored by validator/compiler/runtime.",
                  "additionalProperties": {
                    "type": "string"
                  }
                }
              },
              "required": [
                "contract_type",
                "objective_layers",
                "feasibility_control",
                "target_policy",
                "protected_metrics",
                "resource_policy",
                "exit_conditions"
              ],
              "additionalProperties": false
            }
          },
          "required": [
            "action",
            "contract_review",
            "next_contract"
          ],
          "additionalProperties": false
        },
        {
          "type": "object",
          "properties": {
            "action": {
              "type": "string",
              "const": "stop_run"
            },
            "contract_review": {
              "type": "object",
              "description": "Human-readable review ignored by runtime.",
              "properties": {
                "outcome_summary": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "description": "What happened during the completed contract."
                },
                "main_lesson": {
                  "type": "string",

                "main_lesson"
              ],
              "additionalProperties": false
            },
            "stop_explanation": {
              "type": "string",
              "description": "Why the supervisor decides the run should stop."
            }
          },
          "required": [
            "action",
            "contract_review",
            "stop_explanation"
          ],
          "additionalProperties": false
        }
      ]
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "supervisor_decision"
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false
}
```

<details>

```text
{
  "supervisor_decision": {
    "action": "issue_contract",
    "contract_review": {
      "outcome_summary": "Contract C002 (alns_search) failed due to stagnation after 5 solver actions. Best feasible solution has 6 missed priority and 5 unassigned, which is improved from baseline (12,12) but not zero. Stagnation indicates current search dynamics are exhausted.",
      "main_lesson": "Despite stagnation, remaining budget allows one more focused attempt. Final_refinement with strict feasibility and targeted priorities may reduce missed/unassigned further without regressing."
    },
    "next_contract": {
      "contract_type": "final_refinement",
      "objective_layers": [
        "missed_priority",
        "unassigned_count",
        "energy_total"
      ],
      "feasibility_control": {
        "mode": "strict",
        "relaxation_ratios": []
      },
      "target_policy": {
        "preferred_target_kinds": [
          "unassigned_priority",
          "insertion_scarce_unassigned"
        ]
      },
      "protected_metrics": [
        {
          "metric": "missed_priority",
          "max_worsen": 0.0
        },
        {
          "metric": "unassigned_count",
          "max_worsen": 0.0
        }
      ],
      "resource_policy": {
        "min_actions": 1,
        "max_actions": 3,
        "max_iters": 1630,
        "max_time_sec": 112.5
      },
      "exit_conditions": {
        "success": [
          {
            "condition_id": "zero_missed",
            "source": "best_feasible.missed_priority",
            "op": "==",
            "value": 0,
            "window": 1
          },
          {
            "condition_id": "zero_unassigned",
            "source": "best_feasible.unassigned_count",
            "op": "==",
            "value": 0,
            "window": 1
          }
        ],
        "failure": [
          {
            "condition_id": "stagnation",
            "source": "last.improvement_flags.run_global_best_improved",
            "op": "==",
            "value": false,
            "window": 3
          },
          {
            "condition_id": "max_actions",
            "source": "progress.solver_actions",
            "op": ">=",
            "value": 3,
            "window": 1
          }
        ]
      },
      "explanation": {
        "contract_choice": "Final_refinement uses more granular operators than ALNS, suitable for fine-tuning from a good feasible solution.",
        "objective_layers": "Top priority coverage metrics first; energy secondary to guide efficiency.",
        "feasibility_mode": "Strict to avoid introducing any infeasibility.",
        "target_policy": "Focus on tasks with high priority and insertion scarcity to reduce missed/unassigned.",
        "protected_metrics": "Guarantee no regression on coverage metrics.",
        "resource_policy": "Use all remaining budget (max 3 actions, full iters/time).",
        "exit_conditions": "Stop on success (zero gaps) or on stagnation/action limit."
      }
    }
  }
}
```

```json
{
  "supervisor_decision": {
```
```text
    "action": "stop_run",
    "contract_review": {
      "outcome_summary": "Final refinement contract C003 failed because the solver exhausted its allowed actions (3) without achieving zero missed priority or zero unassigned. It improved missed_priority from 6 to 5 and unassigned from 5 to 4 (working), but not to target. The last stage showed energy improvement without degrading primary metrics.",
      "main_lesson": "Without additional solver actions or time, further improvement is impossible; the run should stop."
    },
    "stop_explanation": "No remaining solver actions or time budget (max_solver_actions=0, max_time_sec=0.0); further contracts cannot be issued. The prioritization goal is partially met: missed_priority reduced from 6 to 5, unassigned from 5 to 4, but not to zero. Resource reduction goal (energy) also improved. However, no further progress is possible given budget constraints."
  }
}
```
